Removed_Other.purpose: Ensures a uniform appearance and functionality for selecting dates and times during testing.

Removed_Other.name: FIntShareCaptureUploadVideoToApiRolloutLimit_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on the number of videos that can be uploaded to the API during a rollout phase.
Removed_Other.purpose: Helps manage server load while allowing players to share their gameplay videos.
